h1: Pantry Pest Control in NYC — Finding and Eliminating the Source
heroParagraph: Indian meal moths, saw-toothed grain beetles, weevils, and flour beetles — pantry pests are often introduced into NYC apartments in purchased groceries already infested at the packaging level. They spread rapidly to other stored goods. Treatment requires identifying and discarding all infested products, treating shelving and storage areas, and in multi-unit buildings, checking adjacent units where infestations can spread through shared walls.
